'''âw-y-ng''' ('''kawayang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wharve|wharve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wharve|wharve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kawayang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwayang|thiwayang]] || [[word:jiwayang|jiwayang]] || [[word:shiwayang|shiwayang]] || [[word:kiwayang|kiwayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwayang|thuthuwayang]] || [[word:jujuwayang|jujuwayang]] || [[word:shushuwayang|shushuwayang]] || [[word:kukuwayang|kukuwayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwayang|thuwayang]] || [[word:juwayang|juwayang]] || [[word:shuwayang|shuwayang]] || [[word:kuwayang|kuwayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwayang|thuwayang]] || [[word:juwayang|juwayang]] || [[word:shuwayang|shuwayang]] || [[word:kuwayang|kuwayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewayang|thewayang]] || [[word:jewayang|jewayang]] || [[word:shewayang|shewayang]] || [[word:kewayang|kewayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowayang|thothowayang]] || [[word:jojowayang|jojowayang]] || [[word:shoshowayang|shoshowayang]] || [[word:kokowayang|kokowayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowayang|thowayang]] || [[word:jowayang|jowayang]] || [[word:showayang|showayang]] || [[word:kowayang|kowayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowayang|thowayang]] || [[word:jowayang|jowayang]] || [[word:showayang|showayang]] || [[word:kowayang|kowayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwayang|thĂŠwayang]] || [[word:jĂŠwayang|jĂŠwayang]] || [[word:shĂŠwayang|shĂŠwayang]] || [[word:kĂŠwayang|kĂŠwayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawayang|thathawayang]] || [[word:jajawayang|jajawayang]] || [[word:shashawayang|shashawayang]] || [[word:kakawayang|kakawayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawayang|thawayang]] || [[word:jawayang|jawayang]] || [[word:shawayang|shawayang]] || [[word:kawayang|kawayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawayang|thawayang]] || [[word:jawayang|jawayang]] || [[word:shawayang|shawayang]] || [[word:kawayang|kawayang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawayang|shawayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawayang|goshawayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawayang|gokishawayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawayangnĂŒ|shawayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawayangnknĂŒ|goshawayangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayangnĂŒ|gokishawayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawayangshĂ«|shawayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawayangnkshĂ«|goshawayangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawayangshĂ«|gokishawayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayangro|shawayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayangnkro|goshawayangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayangro|gokishawayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayangmu|shawayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayangnkmu|goshawayangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayangmu|gokishawayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawayangsher|shawayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawayangnksher|goshawayangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawayangsher|gokishawayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawayang|shawayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawayangnkng|goshawayangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawayang|gokishawayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawayangya|shawayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawayangnkya|goshawayangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawayangya|gokishawayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawayangyam|shawayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawayangnkyam|goshawayangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawayangyam|gokishawayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayangnĂŒshĂ«|shawayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawayangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayangnĂŒro|shawayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayangnknĂŒro|goshawayangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayangnĂŒro|gokishawayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayangnĂŒmu|shawayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayangnknĂŒmu|goshawayangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayangnĂŒmu|gokishawayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayangshĂ«nĂŒ|shawayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayangshĂ«ro|shawayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayangnkshĂ«ro|goshawayangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayangshĂ«ro|gokishawayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayangshĂ«mu|shawayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayangnkshĂ«mu|goshawayangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayangshĂ«mu|gokishawayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayangronĂŒ|shawayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayangnkronĂŒ|goshawayangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayangronĂŒ|gokishawayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayangroshĂ«|shawayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayangnkroshĂ«|goshawayangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayangroshĂ«|gokishawayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayangromu|shawayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayangnkromu|goshawayangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayangromu|gokishawayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayangmunĂŒ|shawayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayangnkmunĂŒ|goshawayangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayangmunĂŒ|gokishawayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayangmushĂ«|shawayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayangnkmushĂ«|goshawayangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayangmushĂ«|gokishawayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayangmuro|shawayangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayangnkmuro|goshawayangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayangmuro|gokishawayangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
